emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: Re: CSFB Sara We do have an executed agreement. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 10/20/2000 11:55 AM

emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: Sorry to be so picky here, but do we also have CSFB's signature? Stephanie Panus@ENRON 10/20/2000 03:30 PM

emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: There is no signature block for CSFB, only ENA. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 10/23/2000 08:25 AM

emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: what about PrimeTrade (which is owned by CSFB)? Stephanie Panus@ENRON 10/23/2000 08:44 AM

emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: The agreement with Prime Trade has been executed by ENA and was sent to Prime Trade for execution on September 21. We have not yet received the executed agreement back from them. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 10/23/2000 09:36 AM

emails.subject: CSFB
emails.body: CSFB Stephanie: has this Enron Corp. ISDA master gone out? Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: CSFB
emails.body: Re: CSFB No. I do not have any contact information for them. From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 02/07/2001 08:44 AM
